edgeCases: Stale-vs-fresh boundary: marker at == latest artifact mtime suppresses; strictly-later artifact re-fires
Malformed marker JSON is treated as stale and re-emits without crashing the hook
Unparseable RFC3339 at field is treated as stale and re-emits
Precedence: missing ROADMAP.md emits roadmap-required, not checkpoint
Precedence: invalid roadmap.json emits roadmap-json directive, not checkpoint
Suppressed when bootstrap complete (all Phase 0 features done) or no Phase 0 phase exists
Suppressed when the workflow file for the first incomplete feature already exists
Multi-feature: first done, second incomplete picks the second as panel target
Anti-spam idempotency: real centinela roadmap iterate then a second hook setup stays silent
mtime-granularity trade-off: second-precision marker at vs sub-second artifact mtimes can re-fire on same-second writes (documented, not papered over)
Degenerate no-artifacts-on-disk with a valid marker suppresses rather than emitting a meaningless decision
